children.name: firefox
Auth API
POST /api/auth/login returns 200 and token with valid credentials @smoke
POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for invalid password @smoke
POST /api/auth/login returns 400 when email is missing
POST /api/auth/login returns 400 when password is missing
valid token grants access to GET /api/auth/me
request without token returns 401
request with invalid token returns 403
POST /api/auth/logout invalidates the token
Metrics API
GET /api/metrics returns all expected fields @smoke
should return exactly 4 metric cards
each metric card should have required shape
series should contain 30 days of data
GET /api/metrics returns 401 without token
Users API
GET /api/users returns paginated list @smoke
GET /api/users supports search query
POST /api/users creates a new user
POST /api/users returns 400 for missing required fields
PUT /api/users/:id updates user role
DELETE /api/users/:id removes user
GET /api/users/:id returns 404 for non-existent user
Login
should log in with valid admin credentials @smoke
should log in with valid editor credentials
should show error message when password is incorrect @smoke
should show error message when email is not registered
should show error when email field is empty
should show error when password field is empty
should not be vulnerable to SQL injection in email field
should handle very long input without crashing
should set remember me flag in localStorage
should redirect to dashboard if already authenticated
Logout
should log out and redirect to login page @smoke
should clear localStorage token on logout
should redirect to login when accessing protected route after logout
Session Persistence
should persist session across page reload
should have valid token in localStorage after login
should have user profile in localStorage after login
Dashboard Metrics
should display all 4 metric cards @smoke
each metric card should show a numeric value
each metric card should show a trend direction indicator
activity chart canvas should render with data
traffic chart canvas should be visible
should display correctly at 1280px viewport
should display correctly at 768px viewport
Sidebar Navigation
should navigate to analytics page @smoke
should navigate to users page
should navigate to reports page
dashboard nav item should be active on dashboard page
analytics nav item should be active on analytics page
Dashboard Widgets
activity feed should display items
activity items should show timestamps
notification bell should be visible in header
user avatar should show initials in header
Report Export and Delete
should show undo toast after deleting a report @smoke
should restore report after clicking undo
report list should have at least one report
each report should show status badge
Generate Report Wizard
should open wizard on button click @smoke
should progress through all 3 wizard steps
should generate report and show in list
should not advance from step 1 without filling required fields
download CSV button should be present on reports
User Role Permissions
admin should see add user button
viewer should still see users table
admin should see delete buttons on user rows
all roles should be able to view the dashboard
User Management
should load users table with data @smoke
should filter users by search query
should filter users by role
should sort users by name ascending
should open add user modal on button click @smoke
should add a new user successfully
should show validation errors when submitting empty form
should show email validation error for invalid email format
should close modal on cancel
should open delete confirmation dialog
should delete a user after confirmation
should cancel delete dialog without deleting
should show pagination controls
